text.title: Design Review Facilitation Script Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Design Review Facilitation Script end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: state-review-ask
step.action: Open with the single-sentence review-ask + round structure.

step.name: round-1-clarify
step.action: Reviewers ask clarify questions only; designer answers.

step.name: round-2-critique
step.action: Reviewers critique; designer takes notes silently.

step.name: triage-must-fix
step.action: Each reviewer picks 1 must-fix; designer commits or declines with reason.

step.name: route-and-store
step.action: Create tracker tickets; run validator; store artefact.
